name: Cosmic Tempest
short_description: Blast through the stars in this high-octane platformer-shooter!
detailed_description:
Blast through the stars in this high-octane platformer-shooter!

Step into the space suit of a fearless astronaut on a mission to stop an alien invasion threatening the galaxy. Cosmic Tempest combines fast-paced action, tight platforming, and explosive shootouts across a variety of dynamic arenas.

Fight your way through:

  • Endless-wave combat zones teeming with alien enemies

  • Massive boss battles that push your skills to the limit

Your weapon evolves automatically as you progress — unlocking three power stages that unleash devastating firepower just when you need it most.

Whether you're dodging lasers, leaping over alien-infested gaps, or holding the line against impossible odds, Cosmic Tempest delivers an adrenaline-pumping experience that keeps you coming back for one more run.

Features

  • Fast-paced 2D platformer shooter gameplay

  • Bold sci-fi pixel art style and energetic soundtrack

Survive the storm. Save the galaxy.
Are you ready for the Cosmic Tempest?
